ogTitle: Paddys Green vs Palen Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Paddys Green and Palen Creek.
heading: Paddys Green vs Palen Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Paddys Green, Queensland and Palen Creek, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Paddys Green has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Palen Creek (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Paddys Green or Palen Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Paddys Green has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Palen Creek scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Paddys Green scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Palen Creek scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Paddys Green or Palen Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Paddys Green has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
